codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies VAL-INSTALL-005/006: commit 069749d adds a tap-ready formula at Formula/mors.rb with required metadata, install/test stanzas, and dependency strategy (node, python build, sqlcipher), plus install-focused tests validating formula presence/structure and metadata alignment. Handoff evidence includes successful brew style/audit (with expected license exception), local brew install, brew test, and runnable mors --version output.
